title: Finite Hitting-Time Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite hitting-time bad expected-time QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed expected hitting-time table where exact replay reduces the start-state equation to 2*h_start = 2 + h_start + h_middle, conflicting with h_start = 3 and h_middle = 2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional absorption-probability or finite-horizon rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep recurrence, transience, optional stopping, mixing, and infinite-horizon potential theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite hitting events and absorbing targets over explicit finite transition matrices.
Replay first-hit distributions, survival probabilities, absorption probabilities, and expected hitting-time equations by exact rational arithmetic.
Keep malformed potential/hitting-time table rejections on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path when they reduce to linear equations.
Keep recurrence, transience, stopping theorems, and infinite-horizon convergence marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
